title: Fork Aquila + Focus + Operadics into substrate-owned category-theory primitives cluster
description: Phase C.2 (PRIORITY 2) of typelift-substrate-modernization. Three typelift packages cluster around category-theory primitives substrate's ordinality discipline reaches for: (1) Aquila — category-theory primitives (functors, natural transformations, morphism composition); (2) Focus — lenses + traversals (functional optics for nested Codable mutation); (3) Operadics — operad-based abstractions (composable typed-operation algebras). Fork scope: audit each package's API surface (depends on per-package-audit completion); identify which abstractions substrate genuinely needs (substrate has hand-rolled lens-shaped property accessors in several places; substrate has no operad primitives but its ordinality tables hint at the register); fork each as substrate-owned modernized SPM package at `private/universal/substrate/collectives/wrkstrm-core/private/cross/spm/<slug>/` or `swift-universal/private/universal/domain/tooling/spm/<slug>/` depending on shape; modernize per the TypeLift 2026 fork standard (Swift tools 6.3, strict concurrency / Sendable, Swift Testing, law definitions decoupled from the test runner, deterministic replay/shrinking, named APIs over operator-only APIs). Sub-bead candidates may spawn if any of the three turns out to be substantial-enough to warrant its own work-stream.
